recommendations.title: Captain Corelli's Mandolin
recommendations.overview: When a fisherman leaves to fight with the Greek army during World War II, his fiancée falls in love with the local Italian commander.

recommendations.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
recommendations.overview: British retirees travel to India to take up residence in what they believe is a newly restored hotel. Less luxurious than its advertisements, the Marigold Hotel nevertheless slowly begins to charm in unexpected ways as the residents find new purpose

recommendations.title: Killshot
recommendations.overview: Beautiful Carmen Colson and her ironworker husband Wayne are placed in the Federal Witness Protection program after witnessing an "incident". Thinking they are at last safe, they are targeted by an experienced hit man and a psychopathic young upstart

recommendations.title: Mrs Brown
recommendations.overview: When Queen Victoria's husband Prince Albert dies, she finds solace in her trusted servant, Mr. John Brown. But their relationship also brings scandal and turmoil to the monarchy.

recommendations.title: The Second Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
recommendations.overview: As the Best Exotic Marigold Hotel has only a single remaining vacancy - posing a rooming predicament for two fresh arrivals - Sonny pursues his expansionist dream of opening a second hotel.

recommendations.title: Shakespeare in Love
recommendations.overview: Young William Shakespeare is forced to stage his latest comedy, 'Romeo and Ethel, the Pirate's Daughter', before it's even written. When lovely noblewoman Viola de Lesseps auditions for a role, they fall into forbidden love — and Shakespeare's play f

recommendations.title: Operation Mincemeat

recommendations.title: Proof

recommendations.title: The Debt
recommendations.overview: Rachel Singer is a former Mossad agent who tried to capture a notorious Nazi war criminal – the Surgeon of Birkenau – in a secret Israeli mission that ended with his death on the streets of East Berlin. Now, 30 years later, a man claiming to be the d

recommendations.title: Running Scared
recommendations.overview: A low-ranking thug is entrusted by his boss to dispose of a gun that killed corrupt cops, but things spiral out of control when the gun ends up in wrong hands.
